data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges Danaher Corporation shareholders to discuss their rights, contact firm to enforce rights.
data.description: In New York on December 24, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, announced an investigation into potential breaches by specific officers and directors of Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR). Shareholders are urged to promptly contact the firm to take necessary actions within a limited timeframe to protect their rights. For more information, reach out to Halper Sadeh LLC immediately.

data.title: Sable Offshore Corp. receives emergency special permit from PHMSA for Santa Ynez Pipeline System segments in Houston.
data.description: Houston-based company, Sable Offshore Corp., has recently been granted a special emergency permit from the Pipeline and Hazardous Materials Safety Administration (PHMSA) for certain segments of their Santa Ynez Pipeline System. This permit allows for immediate action in addressing any safety concerns related to the pipeline system.

data.title: Dow Jones futures up; Micron soars after strong earnings following Oracle-led AI stock sell-off.
data.description: Market experienced significant losses on Wednesday mainly due to decreased stock prices of Oracle and AI companies. However, Micron saw an increase in its stock value towards the end of the day after reporting strong earnings and providing impressive future guidance. Dow Jones futures showed some recovery the following day after the market turmoil. Oracle and AI stocks were the major contributors to the sell-off trend. Micron's positive performance after the news attracted investors' attention.

data.title: Instacart stock drops 6.64% pre-market due to FTC probe into AI pricing tool causing concerns about price variation.
data.description: Shares of Instacart Inc. (NYSE: CART) fell by 6.64% in pre-market trading following reports that the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) is initiating an investigation into its AI-based pricing tool. The FTC has issued a civil investigative demand to Instacart for information regarding its Eversight pricing tool, which assists retailers in testing pricing strategies to gauge shopper responses. Grocers utilizing this tool have witnessed revenue growth between 1-3%, according to the company. However, concerns have been raised after a study revealed that different customers were being charged varying prices for identical items. This study was conducted by Groundwork Collaborative.Instacart has not yet responded to Benzinga's request for comment.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges Fidelity National Information Services shareholders to seek advice on their rights. Contact the firm now. New York, Dec 24, 2025. - PRNewswire.
data.description: Investors are advised to reach out to the company promptly as there might be a restricted timeframe to assert their rights. A law firm known as Halper Sadeh LLC situated in New York has started an investigation concerning the actions of specific executives and board members at Fidelity National Information Services. The investigation is currently ongoing and shareholders are encouraged to contact the firm as soon as possible for further details.

data.title: Sable Offshore's stock surges 68% in after-hours trading to $8.89 as federal agency confirms interstate pipeline status.
data.description: Sable Offshore Corp. (NYSE: SOC) experienced a substantial 68.37% surge in after-hours trading, reaching $8.89, following confirmation from the Pipeline and Hazardous Materials Safety Administration (PHMSA) regarding the interstate pipeline status of its pipeline connecting the Santa Ynez Unit to the Pentland Station terminal in Kern County, California. This confirmation led to a significant increase from the previous closing price of $5.28 on Wednesday, representing a 2.76% decrease. The acknowledgment from PHMSA was disclosed in a Form 8-K filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission, a document utilized by public companies to promptly inform investors about significant developments. For further details, the full story can be accessed on benzinga.com.

data.title: Victor Ciardelli's Rate App to enhance fan experience at Rate Bowl 2025 with Spin-to-Win sweepstakes and tailgate activation. Engages nationwide and in-stadium fans.
data.description: Rate, a prominent fintech company and the title sponsor of the Rate Bowl, is increasing its reach through a new Rate App Spin-to-Win Sweepstakes and Onsite Tailgate Activation. This initiative is engaging fans nationwide and at the stadium. The company made this announcement in Phoenix on December 24, 2025. This move is part of their strategy to connect with a wider audience across various platforms including broadcast and digital.

data.title: S&P 500 hits all-time high on Christmas Eve, reaching over 6,920 points with a 17% year-to-date gain. VIX drops to one-year low of 13.7.
data.description: Investors were pleased with the Christmas gift from Wall Street as the S&P 500 reached new heights and market anxiety dropped to its lowest in over a year. The S&P 500 surpassed 6,920 points in a short trading session before the holiday break, rising 0.2% and increasing its year-to-date profits to 17%. Other major indices also saw slight increases in a day known for light trading. This positive trend marked the fifth consecutive session of gains as stocks prepared for the last week of the year, a time traditionally linked with positive seasonal performance. The CBOE Volatility Index, VIX, decreased to 13.7, a level not seen since December 2024. Top gainers in the S&P 500 on that day were Sandisk Corp. (NASDAQ: SNDK) and Nike Inc. (NYSE: NKE). For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Over $3.1B stolen in Web3 from Jan-June 2025, $594M from phishing. Solana suffered $90M phishing loss in H1 2025. 8,000 malicious transactions tied to 64 phishing accounts. User protection, not chain security, key focus.
data.description: From January to June 2025, over $3.1 billion was stolen in Web3, with $594 million coming from phishing and social engineering attacks targeting users directly. Solana saw approximately $90 million in phishing losses in the first half of 2025, with 8,000 malicious transactions conducted by just 64 phishing accounts between October 2024 and March 2025. The rapid growth of the ecosystem has shifted attackers towards targeting user signatures and attention over smart contract bugs. The main threat vectors investors are currently underestimating include social engineering tactics, abuse of authority transfers within wallet interactions, and cultural gaps in prioritizing user protection over protocol-level defenses. This emphasizes the need for true real-time transaction-level defense measures to protect users effectively. While audits and bug bounties are crucial, they alone cannot safeguard distracted users from falling victim to these sophisticated attacks.

data.title: Ademi Firm investigating Dynavax Technologies Corp. (Nasdaq: DVAX) for fair price in deal with Sanofi. #Investigation #ShareholderAlert
data.description: In Milwaukee on December 24, 2025, it was reported that The Ademi Firm has initiated an investigation into Dynavax (Nasdaq: DVAX) regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duty and legal violations in connection with the company's recent deal with Sanofi. Investors are encouraged to participate in the investigation to gather more information and be a part of the inquiry.

data.title: BOXABL Inc. secures license as "Commercial Modular Manufacturer" in California, a milestone for expansion.LAS VEGAS, Dec. 24, 2025.
data.description: In Las Vegas on December 24, 2025, BOXABL Inc., a prominent provider of factory-built modular solutions, revealed that it has received a vital license from California, designating it as a "Commercial Modular Manufacturer." This milestone signifies a significant advancement for the company as it continues to expand its operations.
